checks.name: deterministic-runner
checks.warning: progression log reports 24 ObjectDB instances leaked at exit

resolved_findings: Explicit memory action cases collect all three memories and reject duplicates.
Room407Back moved beyond the exit so the chase route is open.
Checkpoint failure reasserts chase state and keeps one entity.
GameplayDirector preserves state when a checkpoint exists.
remaining_concerns: Focused interaction/puzzle/checkpoint/settings suites and a production-gate smoke runner are still absent.
Dynamic hallway currently changes labels rather than disabling/activating variant roots.
Progression teardown leaves 24 ObjectDB instances at exit.
Progression must be launched through its .tscn wrapper; direct --script mode cannot resolve autoload identifiers in preloaded gameplay scripts.
No authored pacing timers/cinematics establish the documented 15-20 minute target; manual measured duration is unresolved.
